categories.label: Work Authorization
examplePrompts: Are you authorized to work in the United States?
Can you provide proof of employment eligibility?
categories.notes: Ask explicitly during intake. Do not infer.

categories.label: Sponsorship
examplePrompts: Will you require sponsorship now or in the future?
categories.notes: Ask explicitly during intake. Do not infer.

categories.label: Military and Veteran Status
categories.notes: Voluntary and sensitive. Never infer from resume.

categories.label: Disability and Accommodation
examplePrompts: Can you perform the essential functions with or without accommodation?
categories.notes: Voluntary and sensitive. Never infer from resume. Accommodation questions may require manual review.

categories.label: Voluntary Demographics
categories.notes: Do not infer. Use only configured user preference.

categories.label: Background and Criminal History
examplePrompts: Are you willing to submit to a background check?
Have you been convicted of a felony?
categories.notes: Legal sensitivity varies by jurisdiction. Prefer manual review.

categories.label: Compensation
categories.notes: Use configured range. Salary history questions require special handling.

categories.label: Final Attestation
examplePrompts: I certify that my answers are true
categories.notes: Do not auto-submit unless user rules explicitly allow it.
